REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION ASSERTED BY PLAINTIFF, AS INDIVIDUAL, IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ALLEGE FACTS, OR SUGGEST ANY POSSIBILITY OF AMENDMENT, TO ESTABLISH STANDING AT THIS TIME. BECKWITH V. DAHL (2012) 205 CAL. APP. 4TH 1039 FACTUALLY DISTINGUISHABLE. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION BROUGHT BY PLAINTIFF, AS TRUSTEE, IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR ITS ARGUMENT AND NEITHER THE TRUST NOR THE PROBATE FILES ESTABLISH THAT CARRIE WILSON'S CONSERVATOR IS THE TRUSTEE OF THE OPERATIVE TRUST. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mark Stipert, 415.426.3526 of Lunski & Stimpert appearing via Zoom for Cynthia Markham.
Gordon Atkinson, 415.510.2114 if Gluck Danie Atkinson LLP appearing via Zoom for Defendant Angelo Wilson.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA MARKHAM Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. The interests of justice and the rule of great liberality in allowing amendments prevail over the alleged prejudice that would be caused by a potential delay in trial. (Code Civ. Proc., 576; Board of Trustees v. Superior Court (2007) 149 Cal.App.4th 1154, 1163.). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Frances S. Cheever; Gluck Daniel Atkinson LLP; 415-510-2114; appearing on behalf of defendnats Angelo Wilson, Amara Wilson, Arianna Wilson, Jordan Wilson and Jamila Wilson.
Gordon D. Atkinson; Gluck Daniel Atkinson LLP; 415-510-2114; appearing on behalf of defendnats Angelo Wilson, Amara Wilson, Arianna Wilson, Jordan Wilson and Jamila Wilson.
Marc R. Stimpert; Lunski & Stimpert, LLP; 415-426-3586; appearing on behalf of plaintiff Cynthia Wilson Markham.

Defendants' counsel contests the court's tentative ruling. The court rules on plaintiff's objections to the the declarations of Kevin Hicks and Angelo Wilson in support of defendant's demurrer. The objections as to the declaration of Kevin Hicks were sustained in their entirety. The objections as to the declaration of Angelo Wilson were overruled except as to paragraphs 4, 6, 7, 10, and 11, which were sustained. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to causes of action asserted by plaintiff, as individual, is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege facts, or suggest any possibility of amendment, to establish standing at this time. Beckwith v. Dahl (2012) 205 Cal. App. 4th 1039 factually distinguishable. Demurrer to the causes of action brought by Plaintiff, as trustee, is overruled. Defendant fails to cite any authority for its argument and neither the Trust nor the probate files establish that Carrie Wilson's conservator is the trustee of the operative trust.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
